positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a cosmic forest scene viewed through a geometric aperture. The main elements are bioluminescent flora and fauna, forming clean silhouettes against a deep nebula background. Include giant, crystalline fungi, meandering celestial river patterns, and stylized flying creatures (like neon jellyfish or hummingbirds) rendered in vibrant jewel tones—sapphire, emerald, amethyst. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau elegance and futuristic cosmic vaporwave. Composition must be centralized and balanced, perfect for a circular or square apparel print. The color palette should use high contrast: deep midnight blues and blacks for the background, contrasted with intensely glowing neon accents and glowing gold outlines for the subjects. Minimal gradient bleeding, favoring strong, defined lines and shapes, ensuring maximum print durability.
